data.text: M04/P03 FELISIAN WORLD. AT 40.77 IT WAS ROLLING GROUND TO HILLSIDE
GROUND WITH BROWNISH GRASS AND A FEW BUSHES AND SHRUBS WITH A SMALL
WATER INLET; THE ONLY NOTED THING WAS A MOUND OF INDETERMINABLE TYPE.
AT 42.84 ON SLIGHTLY ROLLING AND BARREN GROUND ARE VERY TALL
PINNAACLES, AND SOME DISTANCEBEYOND (AT LEASH RANGE) ARE SOME OF THE
PSEUDO PYRAMIDAL GROUP OBJECTS. AT 33.82 THERE IS A PILLAR ISLAND, BUT
NOTHING ELSE. 40.84 WAS BARREN AND HILLY WITH A HOPPER WHO PRACTICALLY
ENTERED THE CAPSULE ON LANDING. AT 103.54 THERE IS SOME STANGE GEOLOGY
GOING ON WITH RIDGES AND TRENCHES LEASING TO AREAS OF DISTANT HILLS,
AND THE GROUND IS BARREN AND ANGULAR STONE-LIKE. PRO 0.117.720 PRV
AN S10 WITH 1 PLANET. RYAN GJK E6011.800.886
